summary: Completed testing of multiple attribute conditions (ET/OU logic) feature for business rules. All 13 backend API tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED including form creation, edit, condition groups, and logic dropdowns.
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing machines and test rules
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multiple conditions feature fully tested. Rules with attribute_conditions and conditions_logic work correctly in both API and UI.
